enchantment.betterarcheology.penetrating: Some damage will bypass protection enchantments.

enchantment.betterarcheology.soaring_win: Gives the elytra a boost when taking off.
enchantment.betterarcheology.tunneling.d: Mines the block below the target block as well.
enchantment.create_sa.digging.desc: Allows the drill to dig a bigger hole.

enchantment.deeperdarker.catalysis.desc: Killing mobs will spread sculk nearby.
enchantment.deeperdarker.sculk_smite.des: Increases damage to sculk based mobs.
Attacks deal extra damage to enemies that are not looking at you.
enchantment.dungeonsenchantments.cowardi: Attacks do more damage when the users health is full.
enchantment.dungeonsenchantments.deflect: Arrows may deflect back at the shooter.
enchantment.dungeonsenchantments.guardin: Defeating enemies boosts your defence temporarily.
enchantment.dungeonsenchantments.illager: Attacks do more damage against illagers.
enchantment.dungeonsenchantments.leechin: Defeating enemies will heal the user.
enchantment.dungeonsenchantments.pain_cy: Attacks hurt the user. Every fifth attack deals massive damage.
enchantment.dungeonsenchantments.recycle: Being hit by projectiles sometimes produces arrows.
enchantment.dungeonsenchantments.rush.de: Temporarily increases speed after the user is hurt.
enchantment.dungeonsenchantments.thunder: Attacks strike the target with lightning.

enchantment.endlessbiomes.shared_pain.de: When a mob is killed any excess damage will be dealt to nearby mobs.
enchantment.endlessbiomes.vwooping.desc: Enemies that attack you may be teleported away.
enchantment.enhanced_enchanting.armor_br: Removes every armor point for a few milliseconds.
enchantment.enhanced_enchanting.auto_mlg: Chance to place water when you fall if you have a water bucket in your inventory.
enchantment.enhanced_enchanting.back_sta: Deals more damage to entities not targeting you.
Increases your armor when in hand.
enchantment.enhanced_enchanting.beast_bo: Increases your mob damage by 100% for each level.
enchantment.enhanced_enchanting.block_ca: The more blocks you break, the more efficient your tool becomes.

enchantment.enhanced_enchanting.bouncy.d: Makes you bounce when you fall.
enchantment.enhanced_enchanting.chain.de: Binds the first entity you hit with the second one.
enchantment.enhanced_enchanting.chain_re: 20% chance to shoot arrows when the arrow touches an entity.
enchantment.enhanced_enchanting.cleaving: Adds more cooldown to the shield of the attacked entity.
enchantment.enhanced_enchanting.cold_foc: Increases all your cold damage and your snowball damage.
enchantment.enhanced_enchanting.committe: The more hurt the entity is, the more damage you deal.
enchantment.enhanced_enchanting.critical: Chance to deal a critical hit on each attack.
enchantment.enhanced_enchanting.curse_of: Applies a blur to your vision.
enchantment.enhanced_enchanting.damage_k: Keeps damage in the armor piece and releases it when it reaches the limit.
Makes you dash on attack swing.
enchantment.enhanced_enchanting.double_e: Deals bonus damage to you and to the target.
enchantment.enhanced_enchanting.enchantm: Increases your damage by 5% for each enchantment on the item.
enchantment.enhanced_enchanting.environm: You take less damage from environmental damage.
enchantment.enhanced_enchanting.fire_bal: Throws a fireball at nearby entities.
enchantment.enhanced_enchanting.fire_boo: Sets all nearby entities on fire when you attack.
enchantment.enhanced_enchanting.fire_tra: Press G to leave fire behind you (makes you immune to fire).
enchantment.enhanced_enchanting.fire_wal: Sets on fire the entity that tried to hurt you.
enchantment.enhanced_enchanting.ghost.de: Chance to enter ghost form when hurt.

enchantment.enhanced_enchanting.head_sho: Increases your damage when hitting the head by 100% per level.
enchantment.enhanced_enchanting.hunger.d: Consumes your food bar to repair the item.

enchantment.enhanced_enchanting.last_cry: When you get killed, sets the health of the killer to 0.5♥.
enchantment.enhanced_enchanting.night_vi: Gives you night vision effect when worn.
enchantment.enhanced_enchanting.omniscie: Indicates when a nearby aggressive entity is present.
enchantment.enhanced_enchanting.pearl_la: Right-click to launch an enderpearl (if you have one).
enchantment.enhanced_enchanting.poison_t: Grants a poison effect to the attacked entity.
enchantment.enhanced_enchanting.pusher.d: Pushes back entities you approach when moving fast.
enchantment.enhanced_enchanting.rage_of_: The more damaged the weapon is, the more damage you deal.
enchantment.enhanced_enchanting.rapid_fi: Increases the charging speed of the bow (does not affect animation).

enchantment.enhanced_enchanting.sticky.d: Lets you stick to the ceiling.
enchantment.enhanced_enchanting.storm_ca: Chance to summon lightning on hit.

Regenerates your health after hitting an entity.

enchantment.enhanced_enchanting.wind_arr: Pulls your target a bit closer to you.

enchantment.improved_exp.quick_kill.desc: Attacks have a chance to immediately kill the target
